# kIOHIDElementCommitDirectionIn

**Enumeration Case**

Causes the retrieval of information from the device, and the populating of the element with the resulting data.

## Declaration

```swift
kIOHIDElementCommitDirectionIn
```

## Discussion

Specifying this direction causes the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/commit] function to read the element data from the device and update the current object. You can access the resulting data using the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getValue] or [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getDataValue] functions.

## Getting the Commit Directions

- **kIOHIDElementCommitDirectionOut**: Causes the element data to be sent to the device.
